items.name: Caveman
items.description: Token compression — terse caveman style. ~75% reduction while preserving accuracy.

items.description: Production-grade UI generator. Distinctive, polished components avoiding generic AI aesthetics.

items.name: Superpowers
items.description: Brainstorming · plans · TDD · debugging · subagent orchestration. Reference workflow skills.

items.name: Filesystem MCP
items.description: Read, write, list, search files via MCP. Sandbox to a chosen directory.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: GitHub MCP
items.description: Read repos, issues, PRs via MCP. Auth via GITHUB_TOKEN env var.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: Slack MCP
items.description: Search messages, channels, threads on Slack via MCP.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: Puppeteer MCP
items.description: Headless browser automation — navigate, screenshot, click, fill forms.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: Memory MCP
items.description: Knowledge graph memory — create entities, relations, recall across sessions.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: Fetch MCP
items.description: HTTP fetch — retrieve URLs, parse HTML to markdown for LLM context.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: SQLite MCP
items.description: Query SQLite databases — list tables, execute SELECT, describe schemas.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: Postgres MCP
items.description: Read-only Postgres queries via MCP. Connection via PG_CONNECTION_STRING.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.name: Google Drive MCP
items.description: Browse and read files from Google Drive via MCP. OAuth setup required.
items.author: modelcontextprotocol

items.description: Retro warm palette — yellow accent, brown bg. Great for daylight.

items.description: Soothing pastel — mauve accent. Hyper-popular in dev community.

items.description: Iconic dark — purple/pink accents on near-black. Classic.

items.description: Ethan Schoonover's classic — low-contrast, scientifically calibrated.
